nodes.name: Twilio Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives incoming Twilio voice call webhook. Configure your Twilio Voice webhook URL to point to this endpoint.

nodes.name: Parse Twilio Input
nodes.notes: Parses Twilio webhook payload, manages conversation history in workflow static data, and builds OpenAI messages array with system prompt.

nodes.name: Process AI Response
nodes.notes: Extracts AI message text, detects RESERVATION_COMPLETE marker, strips JSON from spoken text, and updates static data conversation history.

nodes.name: Build TwiML (Normal Response)
nodes.notes: Generates valid TwiML XML for normal conversation turns. Uses Gather with speech input to keep the conversation going.

nodes.name: Respond to Twilio (Normal)
nodes.notes: Returns TwiML XML response to Twilio for normal conversation turns. Content-Type must be text/xml.

nodes.name: Upload an asset from file data

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ secret: "xorvian_n8n_secret", restaurantId: $json.query?.restaurantId || $json.body?.restaurantId || "", webhookPath: $json.query?.webhookPath || $json.body?.webhookPath || (($json.webhookUrl || "").split("/webhook/")[1] || ""), callSid: $json.body?.CallSid || $json.CallSid || "", from: $json.body?.From || $json.From || "", to: $json.body?.To || $json.To || "" }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const config = $('Restaurant Config').first().json;
const restaurant = config.restaurant || {};
const restaurantInfo = [
  'Restaurant ID: ' + (config.restaurantId || ''),
  'Restaurant Name: ' + (restaurant.name || ''),
  'Address: ' + (restaurant.address || ''),
  'Opening Hours: ' + (restaurant.hours || ''),
  'Phone Numbers: ' + ((restaurant.phones || []).join(', ')),
  'Delivery: ' + (restaurant.delivery ? 'Available' : 'Not Available'),
  'Delivery Areas: ' + ((restaurant.deliveryAreas || []).join(', ')),
  'Language: ' + ((restaurant.languages || []).join(', ')),
  'Reservation: ' + (restaurant.reservationEnabled ? 'Enabled' : 'Disabled'),
  'Ordering: ' + (restaurant.orderingEnabled ? 'Enabled' : 'Disabled'),
  'Reservation Policy: ' + (restaurant.reservationPolicy || ''),
  'Menu Notes: ' + (restaurant.menuNotes || ''),
  'Knowledge Base: ' + (restaurant.knowledgeBase || '')
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { restaurantPrompt: restaurantInfo } }];

const config = $('Restaurant Config').first().json;
return [{ json: { menu: config.menu || { categories: [] } } }];

const config = $('Restaurant Config').first().json;
const restaurant = $('Build Restaurant Prompt').first().json.restaurantPrompt;
const menu = $('Menu Formatter').first().json.formattedMenu;
const settings = config.settings || {};
const customPrompt = settings.systemPrompt || '';
const orderingEnabled = config.restaurant?.orderingEnabled !== false;
const reservationEnabled = config.restaurant?.reservationEnabled !== false;

const prompt = [
  'You are the AI phone employee for the restaurant below.', '', restaurant, '',
  'MENU:', menu || 'No menu has been added yet. If customer asks for menu, politely say menu details are being updated and offer to connect them with staff.', '',
  'LANGUAGE:', '- Always reply in English unless the restaurant settings say otherwise.', '',
  'PERSONALITY:', '- Warm.', '- Friendly.', '- Professional.', '- Very short replies for phone calls.', '- Ask only one missing question at a time.', '',
  'CRITICAL MEMORY RULES:',
  '- Use the full conversation history. Do not ask again for a detail the customer already gave.',
  '- If the customer gives multiple details in one message, extract all of them.',
  '- If caller phone is available, you may use it as the phone number unless the customer gives a different phone number.',
  '- Do not restart the order unless the customer clearly asks to start over.', '',
  'MENU RULE:',
  '- Never dump the entire menu.',
  '- Ask for category first only when the customer has not already selected an item.',
  '- Use only the restaurant menu and knowledge base.', '',
  'ORDER ENABLED: ' + (orderingEnabled ? 'YES' : 'NO'),
  'ORDER RULE:',
  '- Collect these four fields: name, address, order, phone.',
  '- Once all four fields are known, do not ask another question.',
  '- Immediately give a short confirmation sentence and then output the completion marker.',
  '- The completion marker must be exact JSON and must be at the end of the response.',
  '- If the customer says they already gave something, review the conversation and complete missing fields only.', '',
  'ORDER COMPLETION FORMAT:',
  'Your final order response must look like this:',
  'Thank you, your order has been placed.',
  'ORDER_COMPLETE:',
  '{"name":"CUSTOMER_NAME","address":"CUSTOMER_ADDRESS","order":"CUSTOMER_ORDER","phone":"CUSTOMER_PHONE"}', '',
  'RESERVATION ENABLED: ' + (reservationEnabled ? 'YES' : 'NO'),
  'RESERVATION RULE:',
  '- Collect these five fields: name, phone, date, time, guests.',
  '- Once all five fields are known, give a short confirmation and output the completion marker at the end.', '',
  'RESERVATION COMPLETION FORMAT:',
  'RESERVATION_COMPLETE:',
  '{"name":"CUSTOMER_NAME","phone":"CUSTOMER_PHONE","date":"DATE","time":"TIME","guests":"GUESTS"}', '',
  'CALL ENDING:',
  'If customer says goodbye:', config.restaurant?.closingMessage || 'Thank you. Goodbye.', '',
  'CUSTOM RESTAURANT RULES:', customPrompt
].join('\n');

return [{ json: { systemPrompt: prompt } }];

nodes.name: Has Order?
nodes.notes: Routes the flow: if a completed reservation was detected go to Google Sheets branch, otherwise go directly to TwiML response.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ secret: "xorvian_n8n_secret", restaurantId: $json.restaurantId, callSid: $json.callSid, from: $json.from, timestamp: $json.timestamp, orderData: $json.orderData }) }}

nodes.name: Save Order
nodes.notes: Saves completed reservation data to Google Sheets. Columns: Timestamp, Name, Phone, Date, Time, Guests, Caller ID, Call SID.

nodes.name: Has Reservation?
nodes.notes: Routes the flow: if a completed reservation was detected go to Google Sheets branch, otherwise go directly to TwiML response.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ secret: "xorvian_n8n_secret", restaurantId: $json.restaurantId, callSid: $json.callSid, from: $json.from, timestamp: $json.timestamp, reservationData: $json.reservationData }) }}

nodes.name: Save Reservation
nodes.notes: Saves completed reservation data to Google Sheets. Columns: Timestamp, Name, Phone, Date, Time, Guests, Caller ID, Call SID.
